Aram's family thinks he's wasting his life and education by working in the coffee house. Soon after moving into the apartment, Sandy hires Aram to be her nanny while she takes on work for the first time since her children were born. programme.desc: Grampa falls for a con man's scheme and buys a worthless dog.

programme.title: The Rifleman: S1 E 2 - Home Ranch
programme.desc: After a cattle drive goes awry, Lucas McCain and his son Mark find themselves stranded and forced to seek help from a wealthy rancher. However, they soon discover that the rancher’s hospitality masks a dangerous plan to seize surrounding land, pulling Lucas into a confrontation where he must defend his rights and protect his son

programme.title: Jesse and Lester 1972
programme.desc: In Jesse and Lester, Gianni Garko and Aldo Sambrell star in a Spaghetti Western with a comedic twist. When rough-and-tumble gunman Jesse teams up with mild-mannered preacher Lester, the unlikely duo sets out to claim an inheritance that could change their lives. But standing in their way are outlaws, double-crosses, and plenty of misadventures on the trail. Blending sharp humor, action, and classic Western style, this buddy adventure proves that opposites can make the wildest partners.

programme.title: The Crooked Trail
